bucket_name: Diabetes members with open preventive care gaps
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '100 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE)
